title: Section 64
content: 1[64. Owner's right to deal with warehoused goods.--The owner of any warehoused goods may, after warehousing the same,-- (a) inspect the goods; (b) deal with their containers in such manner as may be necessary to prevent loss or deterioration or damage to the goods; (c) sort the goods; or (d) show the goods for sale.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 28 of 2016, s. 130, for section 64 (w.e.f. 14-5-2016).
